description: HelloMavens-authored editorial overrides for SBS controls whose upstream YAML is missing a required field. Applied by scripts/sync-sbs.ts before the YAML is normalized into controls.json. See control-overrides.LICENSE.txt for the full rationale per entry.

SBS-AUTH-004.rationale: Upstream YAML omits the risk_level field (verified at v0.4.1). The control mandates strong MFA for external users with substantial access to sensitive data; the title's 'Substantial Access to Sensitive Data' scope and the SBS narrative's MUST language put it firmly in the Critical tier. Default would otherwise be 'High' which would understate the data-exposure risk.
